languages.original_text: "Or..." {n}Trazyn breaks off into gleeful laughter.{/n} "Or... in exchange for a favour, I will accept into my collection one interesting article I spied on your ship when I was observing the dynasty through your eyes. I did not expect to encounter something unique on an ordinary human vessel. You call it 'Nomos.' I am intrigued by the nature of this phenomenon and would like to have it for my own — in exchange, I will help you deal with Calcazar."

languages.text: "Либо..." {n}Речь Тразина прерывается предвкушающим смешком.{/n} "Либо в обмен на услугу я приму в свою коллекцию занятную вещицу, которую я заметил на твоем корабле, когда следил за династией твоими глазами. Я не ожидал, что встречу на рядовом судне людей что-то уникальное. Ты называешь эту вещь "Номос". Я заинтригован природой этого феномена и хотел бы получить его себе — в обмен на помощь с Калькасаром".

"Or..." {n}Trazyn breaks off into gleeful laughter.{/n} "Or... in exchange for a favour, I will accept into my collection one interesting article I spied on your ship when I was observing the dynasty through your eyes. I did not expect to encounter something unique on an ordinary human vessel. You call it 'Nomos.' I am intrigued by the nature of this phenomenon and would like to have it for my own — in exchange, I will help you deal with Calcazar."

Я не ожидал, что встречу на рядовом судне людей что-то уникальное. Ты называешь эту вещь "Номос". Я заинтригован природой этого феномена и хотел бы получить его себе — в обмен на помощь с Калькасаром".

I did not expect to encounter something unique on an ordinary human vessel. You call it 'Nomos.' I am intrigued by the nature of this phenomenon and would like to have it for my own — in exchange, I will help you deal with Calcazar."

I did not expect to encounter something unique on an ordinary human vessel. You call it 'Nomos.' I am intrigued by the nature of this phenomenon and would like to have it for my own — in exchange, I will help you deal with Calcazar."

"Or..." {n}Trazyn breaks off into gleeful laughter.{/n} "Or... in exchange for a favour, I will accept into my collection one interesting article I spied on your ship when I was observing the dynasty through your eyes. I did not expect to encounter something unique on an ordinary human vessel. You call it 'Nomos.' I am intrigued by the nature of this phenomenon and would like to have it for my own — in exchange, I will help you deal with Calcazar."

languages.text: «O...». {n}Trazyn interrumpe sus palabras con una risa alegre.{/n} «O... a cambio de un favor, añadiré a mi colección un artículo interesante que vi en tu nave cuando observaba a la dinastía a través de tus ojos. No esperaba encontrar algo tan único en una nave humana corriente. Lo llamas "Nomos". Me intriga la naturaleza de este fenómeno y me gustaría tenerlo en mi posesión. A cambio, te ayudaré a lidiar con Calcazar».
languages.original_text: "Or..." {n}Trazyn breaks off into gleeful laughter.{/n} "Or... in exchange for a favour, I will accept into my collection one interesting article I spied on your ship when I was observing the dynasty through your eyes. I did not expect to encounter something unique on an ordinary human vessel. You call it 'Nomos.' I am intrigued by the nature of this phenomenon and would like to have it for my own — in exchange, I will help you deal with Calcazar."

traits.locale_text: «O...». {n}Trazyn interrumpe sus palabras con una risa alegre.{/n} «O... a cambio de un favor, añadiré a mi colección un artículo interesante que vi en tu nave cuando observaba a la dinastía a través de tus ojos. No esperaba encontrar algo tan único en una nave humana corriente. Lo llamas "Nomos". Me intriga la naturaleza de este fenómeno y me gustaría tenerlo en mi posesión. A cambio, te ayudaré a lidiar con Calcazar».

languages.text: “或者……”{n}特拉金突然发出得意的笑声。{/n}“或者……你送我个人情。我看上了你船上的一个有趣物件，有意将它纳入我的收藏。我借你的眼睛窥探这个王朝时，一眼就相中了它。没想到在一艘普通的人类舰船上会有如此特别的东西。你们叫它‘诺莫斯’。我对它的本质很感兴趣，打算将其收入囊中。作为交换，我会帮你对付卡尔卡扎。”
languages.original_text: "Or..." {n}Trazyn breaks off into gleeful laughter.{/n} "Or... in exchange for a favour, I will accept into my collection one interesting article I spied on your ship when I was observing the dynasty through your eyes. I did not expect to encounter something unique on an ordinary human vessel. You call it 'Nomos.' I am intrigued by the nature of this phenomenon and would like to have it for my own — in exchange, I will help you deal with Calcazar."

traits.locale_text: “或者……”{n}特拉金突然发出得意的笑声。{/n}“或者……你送我个人情。我看上了你船上的一个有趣物件，有意将它纳入我的收藏。我借你的眼睛窥探这个王朝时，一眼就相中了它。没想到在一艘普通的人类舰船上会有如此特别的东西。你们叫它‘诺莫斯’。我对它的本质很感兴趣，打算将其收入囊中。作为交换，我会帮你对付卡尔卡扎。”

languages.text: « Ou alors... {n}commence Trazyn avant d'éclater d'un rire exultant.{/n} Lorsque j'observais la dynastie à travers vos yeux, j'ai aperçu sur votre vaisseau une curiosité que je me ferais une joie d'ajouter à ma collection. Je ne m'attendais certainement pas à découvrir quelque chose d'aussi remarquable à bord d'un vaisseau humain ordinaire. Vous l'appelez "Nomos". Ce phénomène m'intrigue au plus haut point et j'aimerais en faire l'acquisition afin d'étudier sa nature. En échange, je vous aiderai à vous occuper de Calcazar. »
languages.original_text: "Or..." {n}Trazyn breaks off into gleeful laughter.{/n} "Or... in exchange for a favour, I will accept into my collection one interesting article I spied on your ship when I was observing the dynasty through your eyes. I did not expect to encounter something unique on an ordinary human vessel. You call it 'Nomos.' I am intrigued by the nature of this phenomenon and would like to have it for my own — in exchange, I will help you deal with Calcazar."

traits.locale_text: « Ou alors... {n}commence Trazyn avant d'éclater d'un rire exultant.{/n} Lorsque j'observais la dynastie à travers vos yeux, j'ai aperçu sur votre vaisseau une curiosité que je me ferais une joie d'ajouter à ma collection. Je ne m'attendais certainement pas à découvrir quelque chose d'aussi remarquable à bord d'un vaisseau humain ordinaire. Vous l'appelez "Nomos". Ce phénomène m'intrigue au plus haut point et j'aimerais en faire l'acquisition afin d'étudier sa nature. En échange, je vous aiderai à vous occuper de Calcazar. »

languages.text: "Ya da..." {n}Trazyn, neşeyle kahkaha atıyor.{/n} "Ya da... Bir iyilik karşılığında, hanedanlığı senin gözlerinden izlerken geminde gördüğüm ilginç bir parçayı koleksiyonuma kabul ederim. Sıradan bir insan gemisinde eşsiz bir şeyle karşılaşmayı beklemiyordum. Sen ona 'Nomos' diyorsun. Bu fenomenin doğası ilgimi çekiyor, ona sahip olmak istiyorum. Karşılığında Calcazar ile başa çıkmana yardım edeceğim."
languages.original_text: "Or..." {n}Trazyn breaks off into gleeful laughter.{/n} "Or... in exchange for a favour, I will accept into my collection one interesting article I spied on your ship when I was observing the dynasty through your eyes. I did not expect to encounter something unique on an ordinary human vessel. You call it 'Nomos.' I am intrigued by the nature of this phenomenon and would like to have it for my own — in exchange, I will help you deal with Calcazar."

traits.locale_text: "Ya da..." {n}Trazyn, neşeyle kahkaha atıyor.{/n} "Ya da... Bir iyilik karşılığında, hanedanlığı senin gözlerinden izlerken geminde gördüğüm ilginç bir parçayı koleksiyonuma kabul ederim. Sıradan bir insan gemisinde eşsiz bir şeyle karşılaşmayı beklemiyordum. Sen ona 'Nomos' diyorsun. Bu fenomenin doğası ilgimi çekiyor, ona sahip olmak istiyorum. Karşılığında Calcazar ile başa çıkmana yardım edeceğim."

languages.text: "Oder ..." {n}Trazyn stößt ein hämisches Lachen aus.{/n} "Oder ... ich nehme für eine kleine Gefälligkeit einen interessanten Artikel in meine Sammlung auf, den ich auf deinem Schiff sah, als ich die Dynastie durch deine Augen beobachtet habe. Ich hatte nicht erwartet, auf einem gewöhnlichen Menschenschiff etwas Einzigartiges zu entdecken. Du nennst es 'Nomos'. Ich bin von der Natur dieses Phänomens fasziniert und würde es gern mein Eigen nennen ... im Gegenzug helfe ich dir mit Calcazar."
languages.original_text: "Or..." {n}Trazyn breaks off into gleeful laughter.{/n} "Or... in exchange for a favour, I will accept into my collection one interesting article I spied on your ship when I was observing the dynasty through your eyes. I did not expect to encounter something unique on an ordinary human vessel. You call it 'Nomos.' I am intrigued by the nature of this phenomenon and would like to have it for my own — in exchange, I will help you deal with Calcazar."

traits.locale_text: "Oder ..." {n}Trazyn stößt ein hämisches Lachen aus.{/n} "Oder ... ich nehme für eine kleine Gefälligkeit einen interessanten Artikel in meine Sammlung auf, den ich auf deinem Schiff sah, als ich die Dynastie durch deine Augen beobachtet habe. Ich hatte nicht erwartet, auf einem gewöhnlichen Menschenschiff etwas Einzigartiges zu entdecken. Du nennst es 'Nomos'. Ich bin von der Natur dieses Phänomens fasziniert und würde es gern mein Eigen nennen ... im Gegenzug helfe ich dir mit Calcazar."

languages.text: 「あるいは...」{n}トラズンは喜びに満ちた笑い声をあげた。{/n}「あるいは...お礼の代わりに、私があなたの船で目にした興味深い物体を、私のコレクションに加える。王朝をあなたの目を通して観察していた時に、普通の人間の船でこのようなユニークな物体を目にするとは予想もしなかった。あなたが『ノモス』と呼ぶものだ。この現象の性質に魅了され、私のものでしたい。お礼に、カルカザールとの対決を手助けする。」
languages.original_text: "Or..." {n}Trazyn breaks off into gleeful laughter.{/n} "Or... in exchange for a favour, I will accept into my collection one interesting article I spied on your ship when I was observing the dynasty through your eyes. I did not expect to encounter something unique on an ordinary human vessel. You call it 'Nomos.' I am intrigued by the nature of this phenomenon and would like to have it for my own — in exchange, I will help you deal with Calcazar."
